evals.prompt: no me acuerdo qué decidimos sobre la migración a postgres, en qué sesión fue eso? busca en las sesiones anteriores
evals.expected_output: Should sync index, search for 'migración postgres' or similar, find results from homeserver-automation project sessions, present snippets with decision context showing what was decided and when

assertions.name: used-backscroll-search
assertions.check: Used backscroll search CLI (not manual grep)

assertions.name: found-relevant-sessions
assertions.check: Found at least 1 session with postgres migration content

assertions.name: showed-decision-context
assertions.check: Response explains WHAT was decided (not just 'found a match')

assertions.name: identified-project-origin
assertions.check: Mentioned which project the result came from

evals.prompt: creo que en una sesión anterior estuvimos debuggeando un problema con el pre-push hook, algo de un false positive. puedes encontrar eso?
evals.expected_output: Should search for 'pre-push hook false positive' or variations, find results across projects, show the debugging context with the specific error and resolution

assertions.name: found-hook-sessions
assertions.check: Found session(s) about pre-push hook debugging

assertions.name: showed-false-positive-detail
assertions.check: Response explains what the false positive was

assertions.name: cross-project-fallback
assertions.check: Searched across all projects (not just current)

evals.expected_output: Should show index status, run a broad search, synthesize topic distribution grouped by frequency

assertions.name: identified-multiple-topics
assertions.check: Listed at least 3 distinct topic categories

assertions.name: topics-grounded-in-data
assertions.check: Topics reflect actual session content (not hallucinated)

assertions.name: broad-coverage
assertions.check: Analyzed sessions beyond just the current project
